summary: Iteration 33 testing: Backend 100% pass (13/13 tests). Frontend X button works. Back arrow has rendering issue - collapsed to 1px height making it unclickable.

ui_bugs.issue: Pressable closeButton has collapsed height (1px instead of ~44px). The padding:8 style is not being applied on web, making the button unclickable. Element has has_onclick but click area is only 24x1px.

action_items: FIX: Back arrow Pressable needs explicit minHeight/minWidth or different padding approach. Current styles.closeButton with padding:8 is not being applied on web - Pressable is collapsing to 1px height
SUGGESTION: Add minHeight: 44, minWidth: 44 to closeButton style OR wrap Icon in a View with explicit dimensions
critical_code_review_comments: Back arrow Pressable padding not rendering on web - needs explicit dimensions
X button close works correctly with Pressable + pointerEvents:none fix
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend translations fully working. X button in quiz question screen works correctly. Back arrow button in quiz topics list has rendering issue - Pressable height collapses to 1px. Element 1 in DOM chain has has_onclick and cursor:pointer but height:1px. The closeButton style padding:8 is not being applied to web render.

backend: Italian questions for all 6 advanced subcategories
All 30 translation sets verified (6 subcategories × 5 languages)
Quiz submission with adv_ prefix topics
frontend: X button (close) in quiz question screen - WORKS - clicks and navigates back to quiz list
Studio Avanzato tab shows all 6 subcategories with 8 questions each
Back arrow button in quiz topics list - NOT CLICKABLE - Pressable collapsed to 1px height

rca_of_the_issue: Back arrow Pressable rendered with styles.closeButton has padding:8 in code but DOM shows padding=0px. The child Text/Icon element has lineHeight:1.2 which collapses to 1.2px. Without explicit minHeight on the Pressable, the container collapses. Element chain shows: Element 0 (Text with ←): 24x1px, Element 1 (Pressable container): 24x1px with has_onclick.
